settings.title: Welcoming Sol to the Inkwell Chairs
settings.excerpt: Our newest resident brings a fine line and botanical style we have wanted in the studio for a while.
settings.body:
We are glad to introduce Sol, who joins Inkwell as our fourth resident artist this month.

Sol works in delicate fine line and botanical pieces, the kind of quiet, detailed work that rewards a close look. It fills a gap in what we could offer, and we have already seen the books filling up.

Consultations are free and never rushed. Come in, look through the portfolio on the wall, and talk through an idea even if you are months away from committing to it.
